name: Cornerstone Community Financial Credit Union
description_short: Cornerstone Community Financial Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering competitive rates on loans, deposits, and mortgages with a focus on personalized service.
description_long:
Cornerstone Community Financial Credit Union has been serving members for 75 years, establishing itself as a community-focused financial institution. The credit union operates multiple member centers across Michigan, including a newly opened location in Macomb at 20851 Hall Rd that features drive-thru and in-branch VTMs for member convenience.

The institution offers a comprehensive range of financial products including auto loans, mortgages, home equity loans, personal loans, certificates of deposit (CDs), checking accounts with rewards features, and Visa credit cards. Members can access services through online banking, a mobile app, and in-person at branch locations. The credit union emphasizes competitive pricing, with advertised rates including auto loans as low as 4.49% APR, home equity loans as low as 6.99% APR, mortgages at 5.75% APR for 30-year terms, CD specials up to 3.90% APY, and rewards checking accounts up to 2.02% APY.

What distinguishes Cornerstone is their emphasis on personalized service and community connection rather than just transactional banking. Member testimonials highlight the credit union's willingness to work with borrowers on credit-building loans, ease of online and phone-based loan applications, and competitive rate advantages compared to traditional banks. The institution actively promotes membership through "Become a Member" initiatives and offers personalized offers through digital banking platforms.

As a credit union, Cornerstone operates on a member-ownership model focused on service rather than profit maximization. However, potential members should note that credit union membership may have eligibility requirements, and the breadth of services, while comprehensive, may not match the extensive product offerings of large national banks. The website emphasizes fraud protection education, particularly around quick money scams, demonstrating member-focused risk awareness.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.49% APR, significantly lower than traditional banks according to member testimonials
Newly opened Macomb Member Center with drive-thru and in-branch VTMs for enhanced convenience
Personalized offers available through mobile and online banking platforms tailored to individual member profiles
Flexible CD products with rates up to 3.90% APY offering higher returns than many competitors
Streamlined loan application process available online and by phone from start to finish
Member-focused approach with emphasis on credit building, including willingness to work with first-time borrowers
75-year operational history demonstrating institutional stability and long-term community commitment
cons: Credit union membership may require meeting specific eligibility criteria not detailed on the homepage
Limited geographic footprint compared to national banks, serving primarily Michigan-based members
Website does not provide comprehensive details on membership fees, minimum balance requirements, or account restrictions
Mortgage rates advertised (5.75% on 30-year) are presented without comparison context or rate variability information
No mention of deposit insurance details, ATM network access beyond member centers, or out-of-network banking options
best_for: Michigan-based consumers seeking competitive auto and personal loan rates with personalized service
Homebuyers looking for competitive mortgage rates with community-focused lender support
Members prioritizing member-owned financial institutions that emphasize local community impact
Borrowers building or rebuilding credit who benefit from credit union willingness to work with less-established credit profiles
diagnosis: Cornerstone Community Financial Credit Union is best for Michigan residents seeking competitive loan rates and personalized service from a member-owned institution. The main caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted, and the credit union's geographic reach is limited primarily to Michigan, making it less suitable for those requiring nationwide banking access.
services: Auto loans with rates starting at 4.49% APR
Home equity loans with rates as low as 6.99% APR
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with rates up to 3.90% APY
Rewards checking accounts with rates up to 2.02% APY
Visa credit cards with rates as low as 10.00% APR
Online and mobile banking platforms with personalized offers
In-person and drive-thru member center services
Virtual teller machines (VTMs) at member centers
Fraud protection education and quick money scam alerts
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
